pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target levels remain at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JavaFX version to 21.0.2 to match JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JavaFX 17 may not be fully compatible or optimized for JDK 21 runtime environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Hibernate Core groupId and version to 6.5.0.Final.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate 6.2 used a different groupId structure; 6.5 requires org.hibernate.orm and is compatible with JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add OpenJFX Monocle dependency for headless testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to run JavaFX tests in a headless environment on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Compiler Plugin source and target configuration to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the plugin compiles code for JDK 21.
